summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Aspiiro e-commerce platform. Core functionality working but critical authentication and order flow issues identified.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 520 Internal Server Error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue
critical_bugs.error_details: ValueError: [TypeError("'ObjectId' object is not iterable"), TypeError('vars() argument must have __dict__ attribute')]

critical_bugs.issue: Product creation fails with 520 Internal Server Error
critical_bugs.error_details: Same ObjectId serialization issue as orders
Authentication failed - likely invalid Razorpay test keys

critical_bugs.issue: OTP input field does not appear after clicking 'Send OTP'

integration_issues.issue: Correctly redirects to auth page but auth flow is broken

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, new arrivals, and sale sections
Product listing page with category filters working
Product detail page loads with size selection
Admin dashboard loads with product and order management interface
Cart page shows empty state correctly
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Backend API authentication (both user and admin) working
Product API endpoints returning correct data

critical_fixes: Fix MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue in order and product creation endpoints
Fix frontend OTP input not appearing in authentication flow
Configure valid Razorpay test keys for payment processing
action_item_for_main_agent.priority: CRITICAL - Users cannot authenticate or place orders
action_item_for_main_agent.details: The core e-commerce functionality is blocked by authentication and order creation issues. Frontend UI and navigation work well, but the user journey is broken at login and checkout.
